main.description: Begin a device-pairing flow (OAuth 2.0 device-authorization style). Returns a `deviceId` plus a short human-typable `userCode` and the `verificationUri` where a signed-in user approves the pairing. The caller then polls `dev.cocore.devicePair.poll` until approval.

userCode.description: Short code the user types at the verification URI.

expiresInSecs.description: Seconds until this pairing attempt expires.
